title: Error referring to items in different fork join blocks
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 688 (or 1800-2023 page 756) errors out:

%Error: Can't find definition of 'mod_2'
... note: In instance 'sv12_lrm_p0688_begin'
    |           mod_2.x = 1;
    |                 ^
%Error: Can't find definition of 'mod_1'
... note: In instance 'sv12_lrm_p0688_begin'
    |           mod_1.x = 0;
    |                 ^

**Code:**
```
initial begin
    fork : mod_1
          reg x;
          mod_2.x = 1;
    join
    fork : mod_2
          reg x;
          mod_1.x = 0;
    join
end
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
